title: Full Committee Hearing: Department of the Air Force Fiscal Year 2026 Posture
description: Purpose: The full committee will meet in open session to receive testimony from the Secretary of the Air Force, Chief of Space Operations, and Chief of Staff of the Air Force to learn about the Department of the Air Force’s priorities.
text:
Purpose: The full committee will meet in open session to receive testimony from the Secretary of the Air Force, Chief of Space Operations, and Chief of Staff of the Air Force to learn about the Department of the Air Force’s priorities.
Chairman Rogers' Opening Statement
Witnesses:
The Honorable Troy Meink
Secretary
Department of the Air Force
General B. Chance Saltzman, USSF
Chief of Space Operations
United States Space Force
General David W. Allvin, USAF
Chief of Staff
United States Air Force
Livestream:
